name: Service Outage
description: Complete unavailability of one or more production services
typical_causes: Hardware failure, network partition, bad deployment, cascading failure

name: Performance Degradation
description: Elevated latency or significantly reduced throughput without full unavailability
typical_causes: Memory leak, resource exhaustion, slow queries, noisy neighbours

name: Security Incident
description: Unauthorized access attempt, credential compromise, or policy violation detected
typical_causes: Credential leak, misconfigured ACLs, unpatched CVE, phishing

name: Data Loss or Corruption
description: Partial or complete loss of data integrity or recoverability
typical_causes: Failed backups, storage device failure, runaway delete job, schema migration error

name: Network Disruption
description: Connectivity failure between services or between services and end users
typical_causes: DNS failure, BGP misconfiguration, DDoS, ISP outage, expired TLS certificate

name: Configuration Error
description: Service failure caused by an incorrect configuration value or drift from IaC
typical_causes: Bad deployment config, manual override, environment variable mismatch, feature flag error

name: Capacity Breach
description: Resource limits exceeded causing throttling, OOM kills, or queue saturation
typical_causes: Traffic spike beyond autoscaling limits, data volume growth, inefficient queries

name: Dependency Failure
description: Failure caused by an upstream service or third-party vendor being unavailable
typical_causes: Cloud provider incident, third-party API outage, internal service SLA breach
